task: Read explicit_programming.md first and treat it as the governing design philosophy. Also read the relevant Lalin language reference sections needed to understand idiomatic Lalin regions, continuations, data/control dual tree, emit/forward composition, extern/host ABI boundaries, and metaprogramming. Then inspect experiments/lua_interpreter_vm. Find everything relevant to completing the Lua 5.5 VM idiomatically in Lalin: current VM dual-tree shape, typed data structures, region/control protocols, where current design is explicit or implicit, remaining runtime/compiler/semantic gaps, source and binary compatibility needs, vendored Lua 5.5 oracle facts, weak tables/finalizers/userdata __gc/FFI requirements, tests/conformance gaps, and SponJIT separation. Vendored Lua 5.5 is only semantic/bytecode oracle; do not treat PUC as implementation architecture. Gather raw facts and grounded observations only; do not propose approaches.
